title: Business Analyst Payment (m/w/d)
required_skills: Completed degree in business informatics, business administration with IT focus, or comparable field
Minimum 1 year of relevant experience as Business Analyst in an agile environment
Strong communication skills and independent, self-responsible working style
Sound experience in agile product management, preferably Scrum
bonus_skills: Experience in payment within a retail company
Experience in design, test and management of interfaces/APIs
matched_skills: Completed degree (Master of Management & Entrepreneurship) — partially satisfies degree requirement (business admin focus, not informatics)
Agile Scrum experience: sprint ceremonies, backlog coordination, stakeholder alignment at Hapag-Lloyd — satisfies agile/Scrum requirement
Analytical thinking: KPI analysis, data storytelling, variance reporting at HSBC — satisfies analytical/strategic thinking requirement
Strong communication skills: C-suite reporting, sprint review preparation, meeting facilitation — satisfies communication requirement
Independent working style: autonomous project deliverables across multiple organisations — satisfies independent working requirement
missing_skills: No payment systems or payment domain knowledge (e-commerce payment, payment service providers, PSP integration)
No API or interface design/testing experience
No technical background in cloud-native applications or API management
German B1 falls short of the fluent German required
No experience configuring or managing payment service providers
No product delivery ownership in a technical BA sense (requirements writing, acceptance testing, technical concept translation)
core_responsibilities: Support technical implementation of features and interfaces around APIs and cloud-native applications in the Payment product team
Receive requirements from internal teams; translate into technical concepts; coordinate implementation
Conduct acceptance testing and hand over to operations
Configure and manage BAUHAUS payment service providers; coordinate with international stakeholders
Find innovative technical solutions for process improvements
Improve system monitoring capabilities and ensure operational business continuity
recommended_emphasis: Lead with the agile/Scrum experience at Hapag-Lloyd — this directly addresses the agile product management requirement
Highlight the technology operations coordination at Hapag-Lloyd as closest evidence of digital product/feature delivery support
The payment domain and API/technical knowledge gaps are material — honest disclosure in cover letter advised
German language gap should be flagged; the role requires fluent German for day-to-day work with German-language internal teams and international payment stakeholders
summary: Weak match at 32.1%. The candidate's agile/Scrum experience and analytical skills partially align with the BA role requirements, but the payment domain expertise, API/interface knowledge, technical product background, and fluent German are all absent or insufficient. BAUHAUS is a technically-oriented payment product team needing domain-specific skills. Borderline application at best — the agile experience is a genuine asset but insufficient to overcome the payment technology and language gaps.
